playbook.intent: A project closes successfully → add a case study to portfolio site within 2 weeks while context is fresh. Done = published case study with metrics, client quote (if NDA permits), and shareable link queued into social rotation.
playbook.scope: A project closes successfully → add a case study to portfolio site within 2 weeks while context is fresh. Done = published case study with metrics, client quote (if NDA permits), and shareable link queued into social rotation.

success-criteria.criterion: Capture context stage complete: Metrics doc
Write + design stage complete: Case study draft
Publish + distribute stage complete: Live case study URL

stage.name: Capture context
stage.intent: Within 2 weeks of close, capture metrics + quote while fresh.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with both metrics and a client quote secured.

stage.name: Write + design
stage.intent: Draft a one-page case study with clear hook.

tasks.task: Draft using STAR (Situation Task Action Result) structure
Internal review for clarity + NDA compliance

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after a peer reviewer says hook is clear within 30s.

stage.name: Publish + distribute
stage.intent: Push to portfolio + LinkedIn + Twitter rotation.
stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when case study URL is live + social queue contains it.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content portfolio-site-case-study-update --format md, agent: faion get-content portfolio-site-case-study-update --format context, json: faion get-content portfolio-site-case-study-update --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, atomic angle'}]
